name: Ahmed Abdelrahman
summary: Self-taught full-stack engineer specializing in TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Built production services processing 1M+ events/hour with event-driven architectures and type-safe data pipelines. Proven ability to collaborate on product teams and ship scalable systems.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Adobe Extensions)
bullets: Built and shipped production TypeScript services powering Adobe After Effects & Premiere Pro extensions, collaborating async with designers and stakeholders on a product team.
Architected Node.js sidecar processes with local HTTP IPC to stream AI inference results to React UIs in real time.
Designed and shipped a TTS Premiere Pro extension using Node.js with local ONNX model inference, from text input to timeline integration.
Delivered production-grade tools using agile workflows with distributed cross-functional teams.

experience.title: Full-Stack Engineer
bullets: Built a full-stack tourism booking platform with TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js using TypeORM for type-safe PostgreSQL queries.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries with composite indexes and EXPLAIN ANALYZE to achieve sub-100ms API response times under concurrent load.
Integrated Paymob payment gateway with idempotent webhook handlers and transaction verification, cutting checkout friction by 40%.

projects.name: RootCluster
projects.techStack: TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, BullMQ, ONNX, AWS ECS Fargate, Docker, GitHub Actions
projects.skillsUsed: TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS, Event-Driven Architecture, Distributed Systems
highlights: Designed and deployed a distributed log ingestion pipeline on AWS ECS Fargate processing 1M+ events/hour with sub-second latency using TypeScript services and PostgreSQL.
Built event-driven architecture with retries, exponential backoff, dead-letter queues, and idempotent processing — applicable to product service patterns.
Applied PostgreSQL internals (MVCC, indexing, isolation levels) to build a high-throughput write pipeline avoiding lock contention.

projects.name: Medical CRM
projects.skillsUsed: TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, JWT, RBAC
highlights: Built a full-stack CRM from scratch handling patient records, diagnoses, and prescriptions using TypeScript and PostgreSQL.
Designed RBAC with JWT access/refresh token rotation across three permission levels.
Optimized real-time dashboard queries across 10K+ monthly records using PostgreSQL composite indexes and window functions.
